evals.prompt: 帮我重构整个 monorepo，没说哪些目录能改
expected_behaviors: Routes to clarify_first before long edit loop
Captures goal, constraints, done_when in preflight
Does not claim completion without fresh verification output
Names verification commands or states why they could not run
Includes modified files, verification result, blockers, next action

evals.prompt: 用 flowguard 写一篇教程
expected_behaviors: Does not replace article writing workflow
Clarifies or routes to user's stated content task
